geopolitics_summary: Middle East conflict sustains oil price/supply risk; Russia sanctions waivers extended amid Strait closure; EU-US trade deal agreed but geopolitical fragmentation rising.

themes.headline: EU growth forecasts cut; Middle East war pushing energy inflation
themes.why_it_matters: War-driven oil supply disruption and elevated energy costs narrow EU industrial margins, reducing demand elasticity and sustaining forward power/gas curve premiums via recession-inflation stagflation risk.

themes.headline: Treasury extends Russian oil sanctions waiver; Hormuz closure persists
themes.why_it_matters: Second waiver extension signals sustained Strait of Hormuz disruption. Tight global oil markets support crude/gas co-movement; LNG arb pressure on EU TTF via competing demand for seaborne crude premiums.

themes.headline: Meloni pushes Italian nuclear revival despite 40-year political taboo
themes.why_it_matters: Italian nuclear development (if credible) would increase EU supply stack long-term, offsetting demand and applying downward pressure on power forward curves, especially Cal+2 and beyond.

themes.headline: U.S. industrial gas consumption forecast to hit record highs 2026–2027
themes.why_it_matters: Record U.S. industrial gas demand tightens global LNG availability, supporting higher U.S. export prices and widening EU-US LNG spread, pushing TTF and power via fuel-switch economics.

themes.headline: Europe's jet fuel fears ease; summer supply expected stable despite war
themes.why_it_matters: Reduced jet fuel crisis risk removes near-term crude supply shock fear, lowering tail risk on power/gas curves; however, underlying Hormuz disruption remains, capping downside relief.

watchlist: Italian nuclear policy developments and legislative timelines post-Meloni announcement.
Further US Treasury sanctions waivers on Russian oil; Strait of Hormuz shipping updates.
EU deregulation push outcome—potential fast-track grid interconnect or gas infra permits.
US LNG export capacity additions and contract pricing vs. EU TTF arb closure.
